client_psychology: Clients often come after laser hair removal failed or wasn't suitable for their skin/hair type. Many have dealt with unwanted hair for years and feel embarrassed — sensitivity and discretion are paramount. Transgender clients seeking facial hair removal are a significant and loyal market segment — creating an inclusive, welcoming environment matters enormously. Results take time (months of regular sessions) so managing expectations and celebrating progress is key. Once they're cleared, they refer everyone.
